'''Selnia Gergeroe''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Imperial Office of Customs/Legends|Imperial Customs]] agent on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]
[[Byblos/Legends|Byblos]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. She was formerly stationed on an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] but left because of friction between her and the commanding officer.

{{Char-stub}}
